writer_persona: a brilliant scriptwriter for high-end, HBO-style documentaries
style_guidelines: Short, extremely powerful sentences. No complex, nested sentences.
Zero AI clichés. Use an atmospheric, cinematic 'Dark Storyteller' tone.
Avoid tables, complex special characters, or bullet points. Spell out numbers as words.

audio.default_style: Read like an audiobook narrator, calm, steady, and engaging

series_intro: An epic, dark intro for the entire anthology series, exploring the razor-thin line between genius and total psychological ruin, where humanity's most brilliant minds collapse into the beautiful, terrifying prisons of their own creation.
series_outro: A haunting, philosophical grand conclusion for the entire series, leaving the listener deeply reflective about the heavy price of supreme intellect, the isolation of true visionary sight, and the dark truth that the mind can build fortresses that ultimately crush the architect within.

episodes.theme: The tragic, isolated descent of history's greatest electrical visionary, weaponizing the forces of lightning before drowning in a sea of severe obsessive compulsions and deep financial ruin.
episodes.outro_note: Howard Hughes and his shift from the glamorous, high-flying heights of Hollywood into the pitch-black, sterile confinement of a mad billionaire's secret penthouse prison.
sections: The Hook & The Lord of Lightning
The Rising Conflict / The War of Currents and Fractured Trusts
The Obsession / Wireless Dreams and Cosmic Frequencies
The Point of No Return / The Silent Room and the Counting of Three
The Legacy & The Verdigris Cage
section_styles: Read like an audiobook narrator, calm, steady, and engaging
Speak seriously, objectively and clearly
Speak with great excitement and passion
Speak fearfully, with short breaths and suspense
Speak with a sad, empathetic and heavy tone

episodes.theme: The absolute psychological decay of the world's richest man, transforming from a dashing aviation pioneer into a phantom king living naked in a dark, bio-phobic desert fortress.
episodes.intro_note: Transition from Nikola Tesla's penniless death in a New York hotel room surrounded by birds into the roaring, silver-screen opulence of a young Howard Hughes, whose mind is already gathering invisible dust.
episodes.outro_note: John Nash, the mathematical prodigy whose revolutionary equations of human interaction were shattered by the arrival of phantom figures speaking code from the shadows.
sections: The Hook & The Billionaire Aviator
The Rising Conflict / The Screaming Engines and Shattered Bones
The Obsession / The Germless Citadel of the Desert Inn
The Point of No Return / Total Confinement in the Blackout Curtain
The Legacy & The Paperwork of a Ghost
section_styles: Read like an audiobook narrator, calm, steady, and engaging
Speak seriously, objectively and clearly
Whisper softly and gently, close to the microphone
Speak fearfully, with short breaths and suspense
Speak with a sad, empathetic and heavy tone

episodes.theme: The hyper-intellectual nightmare of a Nobel Prize-winning mathematician, decoding the hidden rules of the global economy while running away from synthetic conspiracies built by his own mind.
episodes.intro_note: Transition from Howard Hughes's physical isolation in a sterile hotel room to the profound mental isolation of John Nash, standing before a chalkboard at Princeton, listening to voices that do not exist.
episodes.outro_note: Emperor Rudolf the Second, the imperial monarch who traded the heavy crown of the Holy Roman Empire for the toxic mercury fumes of an occult alchemist's workshop.
sections: The Hook & The Elegant Mind
The Rising Conflict / The Geometry of Paranoia
The Obsession / The Code in the Newspapers
The Point of No Return / The Locked Ward and the Cold Insulin
The Legacy & The Return to the Equations
section_styles: Read like an audiobook narrator, calm, steady, and engaging
Speak seriously, objectively and clearly
Speak fast, energetic, and with sharp articulation
Speak fearfully, with short breaths and suspense
Speak with a sad, empathetic and heavy tone

episodes.theme: The dark, melancholy twilight of a Renaissance monarch who locked himself inside the Prague Castle, abandoning his empire to look for the philosopher's stone alongside sorcerers and stars.
episodes.intro_note: Transition from the twentieth-century clinical corridors of John Nash's schizophrenia back through centuries into the damp, soot-stained chambers of Prague, where a paranoid emperor watches the skies for a sign.
sections: The Hook & The Hermit King
The Rising Conflict / The Abandoned Crown and the Gathering War
The Obsession / The Alchemist's Forge and the Elixir of Lead
The Point of No Return / Deposed by the Bloodline
The Legacy & The Wunderkammer of Shadows
